inputs.label: Urgency Score (1-10)
inputs.businessContext: Rating of how urgent the task is, 1 being not urgent, 10 extremely urgent.

businessContext_i18n.en: Rating of how urgent the task is, 1 being not urgent, 10 extremely urgent.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Görevin ne kadar acil olduğunu değerlendirin, 1 hiç acil değil, 10 son derece acil.
businessContext_i18n.de: Bewertung, wie dringend die Aufgabe ist, 1 = nicht dringend, 10 = extrem dringend.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Évaluation de l'urgence de la tâche, 1 étant pas urgent, 10 extrêmement urgent.
businessContext_i18n.es: Calificación de cuán urgente es la tarea, siendo 1 nada urgente y 10 extremadamente urgente.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تقييم مدى استعجال المهمة، 1 غير مستعجل، 10 مستعجل جداً.

inputs.label: Importance Score (1-10)
inputs.businessContext: Rating of how important the task is, 1 being not important, 10 extremely important.

businessContext_i18n.en: Rating of how important the task is, 1 being not important, 10 extremely important.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Görevin ne kadar önemli olduğunu değerlendirin, 1 hiç önemli değil, 10 son derece önemli.
businessContext_i18n.de: Bewertung, wie wichtig die Aufgabe ist, 1 = unwichtig, 10 = extrem wichtig.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Évaluation de l'importance de la tâche, 1 étant pas important, 10 extrêmement important.
businessContext_i18n.es: Calificación de cuán importante es la tarea, siendo 1 nada importante y 10 extremadamente importante.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تقييم مدى أهمية المهمة، 1 غير مهم، 10 مهم جداً.

inputs.label: Urgency Weight
inputs.businessContext: Weight assigned to urgency in the priority score calculation. Typically between 0 and 1.

businessContext_i18n.en: Weight assigned to urgency in the priority score calculation. Typically between 0 and 1.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Öncelik puanı hesaplamasında aciliyete atanan ağırlık. Genellikle 0 ile 1 arasında.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewicht der Dringlichkeit bei der Berechnung des Prioritätswerts. Typischerweise zwischen 0 und 1.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids attribué à l'urgence dans le calcul du score de priorité. Généralement entre 0 et 1.
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso asignado a la urgencia en el cálculo de la puntuación de prioridad. Normalmente entre 0 y 1.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الوزن المخصص للاستعجال في حساب درجة الأولوية. عادة بين 0 و1.

inputs.label: Importance Weight
inputs.businessContext: Weight assigned to importance in the priority score calculation. Typically between 0 and 1.

businessContext_i18n.en: Weight assigned to importance in the priority score calculation. Typically between 0 and 1.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Öncelik puanı hesaplamasında öneme atanan ağırlık. Genellikle 0 ile 1 arasında.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewicht der Wichtigkeit bei der Berechnung des Prioritätswerts. Typischerweise zwischen 0 und 1.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids attribué à l'importance dans le calcul du score de priorité. Généralement entre 0 et 1.
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso asignado a la importancia en el cálculo de la puntuación de prioridad. Normalmente entre 0 y 1.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الوزن المخصص للأهمية في حساب درجة الأولوية. عادة بين 0 و1.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
